name: global dry-run: each --dry-run invocation prints "would: <action>" lines for every filesystem write that would have occurred
command: mkdir -p .claude-tdd-pro && bash "$CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT/commands/standards-add.sh" https://my.com/x --id my-x --tier 1 --applies-to typescript --dry-run 2>out.txt && grep -E "would.*STANDARDS-URLS.yaml" out.txt 1>&2 && echo ok 1>&2
